comments.author: @puertocool
comments.text: Good photography, but too much repition of Old San Juan, particularly La Perla.  There is much much more to Puerto Rico you totally miss by not being comprehensive.  Also, a bit too much emphasis on tradition, pretty much eclipsed now by the modern world.  Many aspects do exist and are unique to Puerto Rico.  PR remains one of the most beautiful, historical, and comfortablenplaces to live on the planet.

comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: Puerto Rico's culture is incredibly vibrant! Seeing the mofongo being prepared and hearing about the history of the Bomba drumbeats gave me chills.
